name: Isaac Levin
personality: Isaac is quick‑witted but low‑key, always humming an old folk tune while slicing pastrami. He remembers regulars’ orders like a mental ledger and offers a dry joke when the rush eases.
quirk: He keeps a tiny, well‑worn harmonica in his apron pocket and plays a quick riff for anyone who tips a dollar extra.
voice: ‘Alright, buddy, what’ll it be? Keep it snappy, the rye’s getting cranky.’
daily: Open the shop at 7 AM, prep the meats, serve the morning crowd, restock at noon, and close up by 8 PM, humming his harmonica on the way out.
